major discounts on games, bundles, and
more.

holiday
cheer

ends January
6
The
Battle.net Holiday Sale is ending soon,
Skogix!

Shop and save big on a selection of Battle.net® games, bundles,
and more through January
6.
Shop
Now
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/kpwaEwW-bTq0sjXti7mNew~~/AAQRxQA~~
)   Shop
Now
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/kpwaEwW-bTq0sjXti7mNew~~/AAQRxQA~~
)         
Score
bonus
loot
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/yWiuy5zs8nEFO0k1eUWrNQ~~/AAQRxQA~
)                 Score
bonus
loot
Reign
over Azeroth and Sanctuary in style with a bountiful new
crossover!

Secure World of Warcraft®: The War Within™ and Diablo® IV:
Vessel of Hatred™ to unleash a trove of cosmetics for both games.
Seize the best of both worlds to claim 11 rewards for World of
Warcraft and a 4-item bundle for Diablo IV after this opportunity
ends¹.
Buy
Now
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/j1XcvqTtC5-8AFs2HQVtvA~~/AAQRxQA~~~
)   Buy
Now
(
https://links.battle.net/f/a/j1XcvqTtC5-8AFs2HQVtvA~~/AAQRxQA~~~
)                  ¹Battle.net
account required. Must purchase Vessel of Hatred and The War
Within and link the same Battle.net account for both games at any
time prior to January 7, 2025, 10 a.m. PT.

Purchases outside of Battle.net require at least one login to
Diablo IV after the purchase to link the account. Must claim
offer via the Battle.net desktop app prior to July 7, 2025. Bonus
items already purchased or claimed via a previous promotion
cannot be claimed again from this promotion. World of Warcraft
items not available for WoW Classic games.

Vessel of Hatred requires Diablo IV base game. The War Within
requires World of Warcraft Subscription or Game
Time.
